source.description: A reviewed six-panel pencil-and-colored-pencil process contact sheet.
source.notes: One consistent three-quarter garden rose bloom on a diagonal stem over warm off-white paper. The petal overlaps, sepals, leaves, color areas, and shadow are established before the finishing panel.

process_strategy: The sequence fixes one diagonal stem gesture and tilted bloom cup, builds the outer petal envelope around a reserved center, layers the inner and front petals without drawing hidden bases, adds sepals and two leaves, then introduces restrained rose and leaf color before final cleanup only.

final_elements.name: diagonal stem gesture, tilted bloom cup, and petal-center guides
final_elements.description: A light diagonal stem, oval bloom cup, center spiral, and broad petal envelope fix one three-quarter rose pose.

final_elements.name: outer rose silhouette and open petal envelope
final_elements.description: Five broad outer petals wrap the established cup while leaving a clear reserved center for the tighter petals.

final_elements.name: layered inner petals and front overlap folds
final_elements.description: Curled inner petals grow from the center guide and three front folds overlap the lower cup without rendering hidden petal bases.

final_elements.name: sepals, curved stem, two serrated leaves, and small thorns
final_elements.description: Pointed sepals support the bloom while a curved stem carries two differently angled leaves and two tiny visible thorns.

final_elements.name: rose-pink petals, green leaves and stem, graphite depth, and cast shadow
final_elements.description: Restrained rose-pink and leafy green pencil tint established shapes while soft graphite deepens petal pockets and grounds the stem.

frames.visible_job: Places one diagonal stem gesture, tilted bloom cup, center spiral, and broad petal envelope at a fixed scale.
introduces: diagonal stem gesture, tilted bloom cup, and petal-center guides

frames.visible_job: Builds five broad outer petal contours around the reserved center and clarifies the bloom silhouette.
introduces: outer rose silhouette and open petal envelope
requires_prior_elements: diagonal stem gesture, tilted bloom cup, and petal-center guides

frames.visible_job: Adds curled inner petals and three front overlap folds, drawing only the petal edges that remain visible.
introduces: layered inner petals and front overlap folds
requires_prior_elements: diagonal stem gesture, tilted bloom cup, and petal-center guides
outer rose silhouette and open petal envelope

frames.visible_job: Adds the supporting sepals, curved stem, two differently angled serrated leaves, and two small thorns.
introduces: sepals, curved stem, two serrated leaves, and small thorns
requires_prior_elements: diagonal stem gesture, tilted bloom cup, and petal-center guides
outer rose silhouette and open petal envelope

frames.visible_job: Adds restrained rose-pink, green, and graphite shading to the already established petals, sepals, leaves, stem, and ground area.
introduces: rose-pink petals, green leaves and stem, graphite depth, and cast shadow
requires_prior_elements: outer rose silhouette and open petal envelope
layered inner petals and front overlap folds
sepals, curved stem, two serrated leaves, and small thorns

final_step.visible_job: Only strengthens established petal overlaps, stem and leaf contours, restrained colors, and the soft cast shadow.

rejection_checks: No petal, fold, sepal, leaf, thorn, stem section, color area, or shadow may first appear in the final panel.
The rose must retain one three-quarter bloom angle, diagonal stem, scale, crop, and petal arrangement across all six panels.
Covered petal bases must remain omitted rather than being fully detailed and hidden by later front petals.
Reject large petal-count drift, a different flower species, extra blossoms, a vase, lettering, decorative border, or insects.
The finish must retain visible graphite and colored-pencil texture rather than reading as glossy botanical clip art.
